## OpenxAI Indexer

https://indexer.openxai.org
Indexes OpenxAI smart contract events for efficient retrieval.

## One click deployment

[<img src="https://www.openmesh.network/xnode/deploy-on-xnode.svg" width=200 />](https://www.openmesh.network/xnode/deploy?)

## Commands (in root folder)

```
nix run
```

## Commands (in nodejs-app)

```
npm i
npm run build
npm run start
```
